steps.title: Find the zeros
steps.content:
The function is already factored.
$$
g(x)=x(x-3)(x+5)^2
$$
So its zeros are $0$, $3$, and $-5$.

steps.title: Solve for each w
steps.content:
Because $g(8-w)=0$, the input $8-w$ must equal one of those zeros.
$$
8-w=0
$$
$$
w=8
$$
$$
8-w=3
$$
$$
w=5
$$
$$
8-w=-5
$$
$$
w=13
$$

steps.title: Add the possible values
steps.content: Add all possible values of $w$. $$ 8+5+13=26 $$ The answer is 26.
